introSection: Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Tropic Falls in Foley, Alabama, USA.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Crazy Mouse was announced along with Tropic Falls (then known as Park at OWA) at the 2016 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The coaster officially opened on July 21, 2017.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 6 cars. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.

fullText:
Crazy Mouse is a steel spinning wild mouse roller coaster at Tropic Falls in Foley, Alabama, USA.

Crazy Mouse was announced along with Tropic Falls (then known as Park at OWA) at the 2016 IAAPA Expo in Orlando, Florida, USA.

The coaster officially opened on July 21, 2017.



6 cars. Riders are arranged 4 across in a single row for a total of 4 riders per car.
